'''cholajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zombiesque|zombiesque]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zombiesque|zombiesque]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| cholajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:cholajithi|cholajithi]] || [[word:cholajiji|cholajiji]] || [[word:cholajishi|cholajishi]] || [[word:cholajiki|cholajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:cholajuthuthu|cholajuthuthu]] || [[word:cholajujuju|cholajujuju]] || [[word:cholajushushu|cholajushushu]] || [[word:cholajukuku|cholajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:cholajuthu|cholajuthu]] || [[word:cholajuju|cholajuju]] || [[word:cholajushu|cholajushu]] || [[word:cholajuku|cholajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:cholajufthuf|cholajufthuf]] || [[word:cholajufjuf|cholajufjuf]] || [[word:cholajufshuf|cholajufshuf]] || [[word:cholajufkuf|cholajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:cholajethe|cholajethe]] || [[word:cholajeje|cholajeje]] || [[word:cholajeshe|cholajeshe]] || [[word:cholajeke|cholajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:cholajothotho|cholajothotho]] || [[word:cholajojojo|cholajojojo]] || [[word:cholajoshosho|cholajoshosho]] || [[word:cholajokoko|cholajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:cholajotho|cholajotho]] || [[word:cholajojo|cholajojo]] || [[word:cholajosho|cholajosho]] || [[word:cholajoko|cholajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:cholajofthof|cholajofthof]] || [[word:cholajofjof|cholajofjof]] || [[word:cholajofshof|cholajofshof]] || [[word:cholajofkof|cholajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:cholajïfthïf|cholajïfthïf]] || [[word:cholajïfjïf|cholajïfjïf]] || [[word:cholajïfshïf|cholajïfshïf]] || [[word:cholajïfkïf|cholajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:cholajïfthïfthïf|cholajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:cholajïfjïfjïf|cholajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:cholajïfshïfshïf|cholajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:cholajïfkïfkïf|cholajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:cholajïfthïf|cholajïfthïf]] || [[word:cholajïfjïf|cholajïfjïf]] || [[word:cholajïfshïf|cholajïfshïf]] || [[word:cholajïfkïf|cholajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:cholajïfthïf|cholajïfthïf]] || [[word:cholajïfjïf|cholajïfjïf]] || [[word:cholajïfshïf|cholajïfshïf]] || [[word:cholajïfkïf|cholajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:cholajæthæ|cholajæthæ]] || [[word:cholajæjæ|cholajæjæ]] || [[word:cholajæshæ|cholajæshæ]] || [[word:cholajækæ|cholajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:cholajathatha|cholajathatha]] || [[word:cholajajaja|cholajajaja]] || [[word:cholajashasha|cholajashasha]] || [[word:cholajakaka|cholajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:cholajatha|cholajatha]] || [[word:cholajaja|cholajaja]] || [[word:cholajasha|cholajasha]] || [[word:cholajaka|cholajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:cholajafthaf|cholajafthaf]] || [[word:cholajafjaf|cholajafjaf]] || [[word:cholajafshaf|cholajafshaf]] || [[word:cholajafkaf|cholajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:cholajasha|cholajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:cholajshësha|cholajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:cholajrosha|cholajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:cholajmusha|cholajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:cholajyasha|cholajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gocholajnkshësha|gocholajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gocholajnkrosha|gocholajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gocholajnkmusha|gocholajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gocholajnkyasha|gocholajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:cholalajasha|cholalajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:cholalajshësha|cholalajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:cholalajrosha|cholalajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:cholalajmusha|cholalajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:cholalajyasha|cholalajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gocholalajnkshësha|gocholalajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gocholalajnkrosha|gocholalajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gocholalajnkmusha|gocholalajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gocholalajnkyasha|gocholalajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chelæjasha|chelæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chelæjshësha|chelæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chelæjrosha|chelæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chelæjmusha|chelæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chelæjyasha|chelæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochelæjnkshësha|gochelæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochelæjnkrosha|gochelæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochelæjnkmusha|gochelæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochelæjnkyasha|gochelæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:cholfajasha|cholfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:cholfajshësha|cholfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:cholfajrosha|cholfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:cholfajmusha|cholfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:cholfajyasha|cholfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gocholfajnkshësha|gocholfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gocholfajnkrosha|gocholfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gocholfajnkmusha|gocholfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gocholfajnkyasha|gocholfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
